ogTitle: Rostrevor vs Roxby Downs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rostrevor and Roxby Downs.
heading: Rostrevor vs Roxby Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rostrevor, South Australia and Roxby Downs, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rostrevor has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Roxby Downs (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rostrevor or Roxby Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rostrevor has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Roxby Downs scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rostrevor scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Roxby Downs scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rostrevor or Roxby Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rostrevor has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
